# animate(withWarps:times:restore:)

**Type Method**

Creates an action to distort a node through a sequence of [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] objects.

## Declaration

```swift
class func animate(withWarps warps: [SKWarpGeometry], times: [NSNumber], restore: Bool) -> SKAction?
```

## Parameters

- **warps**: The sequence of warps to apply to the node.
- **times**: The times at which each warp distortion in the sequence should complete.
- **restore**: A Boolean specifying whether to restore the original node’s warpGeometry from before the action.

## Return Value

A new action object.

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometryGrid/numberOfColumns] and [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometryGrid/numberOfRows] in each geometry in the sequence should match.

## Animate the Warping of a Node

- **animate(withWarps:times:)**: Creates an action to distort a node through a sequence of [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] objects.
- **warp(to:duration:)**: Creates an action to distort a node based using an [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] object.
